TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-ancestor_buya
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: tangi pakunkupaiku tu zana masang baqita nizi tayilanan.
S.PHON: taŋi pakunkupaiku tu z~rana masaŋ βaqita niz~ri tajiranan.
S.FORM: tangi pakunkupaiku tu zana masang baqita nizi tayilanan.
S.PHON: taŋi pakunkupaiku tu z~rana masaŋ βaqita niz~ri tajiranan.
S.TRANSL: 今天我要講一個故事, 是有關我們祖先起源於宜蘭的故事.
Today, I am going to tell a story about our ancestors coming from Yi-lan.

S.FORM: masang tayan tayilanan nani mwaza zengnana mwaza banangna baqian tayan na baybedan bayita.
S.PHON: masaŋ tajan tajiranan nani mwaz~ra z~rəŋnana mwaz~ra βanaŋna βaqian tajan na βajβəɮan βajita.
S.FORM: masang tayan tayilanan nani mwaza zengnana mwaza banangna baqian tayan na baybedan bayita.
S.PHON: masaŋ tajan tajiranan nani mwaz~ra z~rəŋnana mwaz~ra βanaŋna βaqian tajan na βajβəɮan βajita.
S.TRANSL: 從前在宜蘭有很多我們祖先的水田和土地.
Some time ago in Yi-lan there were many farms and lands of our ancestors'.

S.FORM: yauti busus maseq taiyan matiw ta yilanan nani.
S.PHON: jauti βusus masəq taijan matiw ta jiranan nani.
S.FORM: yauti busus maseq taiyan matiw ta yilanan nani.
S.PHON: jauti βusus masəq taijan matiw ta jiranan nani.
S.TRANSL: 然後就有漢人到了宜蘭去.
Then, Han people arrived there…went to Yi-lan.

S.FORM: supaR qaniawu kasianem tu sanaqunian tu mala tu zengnana baqita bayita.
S.PHON: supaʁ qaniawu kasianəm tu sanaqunian tu mara tu z~rəŋnana βaqita βajita.
S.FORM: supaR qaniawu kasianem tu sanaqunian tu mala tu zengnana baqita bayita.
S.PHON: supaʁ qaniawu kasianəm tu sanaqunian tu mara tu z~rəŋnana βaqita βajita.
S.TRANSL: 他們很懂得計畫該如何才能得到祖先們的水田.
They were good at planning how to obtain our ancestors' farms.

S.FORM: wanay kebalan muaza lisinna tu zana metiwuay.
S.PHON: wanaj kəβaran muaz~ra risinna tu z~rana mətiwuaj.
S.FORM: wanay kebalan muaza lisinna tu zana metiwuay.
S.PHON: wanaj kəβaran muaz~ra risinna tu z~rana mətiwuaj.
S.TRANSL: 由於噶瑪蘭人有很多的迷信, 比方說巫師之類的東西.
Since Kavalan people have many superstitions, such as something about witches.

S.FORM: zinna kasianem.
S.PHON: z~rinna kasianəm.
S.FORM: zinna kasianem.
S.PHON: z~rinna kasianəm.
S.TRANSL: 他們如此認為.
They think so.

S.FORM: yau 'nay lasap lasapay Ray naRay Raybang taqati tu taiyan tu qayzuanan.
S.PHON: jau ʔnaj rasap rasapaj ʁaj naʁaj ʁajβaŋ taqati tu taijan tu qajz~ruanan.
S.FORM: yau 'nay lasap lasapay Ray naRay Raybang taqati tu taiyan tu qayzuanan.
S.PHON: jau ʔnaj rasap rasapaj ʁaj naʁaj ʁajβaŋ taqati tu taijan tu qajz~ruanan.
S.TRANSL: 某個地方有髒東西的時候, 他們就會放棄那裡.

TRANSL.notes: When there is something dirty (unclean) in a place, they will abandon that place.

S.TRANSL: When there is something dirty in a place, they will abandon that place.

S.FORM: nayau supaRti 'daq.
S.PHON: najau supaʁti ʔɮaq.
S.FORM: nayau supaRti 'daq.
S.PHON: najau supaʁti ʔɮaq.
S.TRANSL: 別人知道了這件事.
Others knew it.

S.FORM: supaRti busus tu waway na kebalan Ranaw nayawannati.
S.PHON: supaʁti βusus tu wawaj na kəβaran ʁanaw najawannati.
S.FORM: supaRti busus tu waway na kebalan Ranaw nayawannati.
S.PHON: supaʁti βusus tu wawaj na kəβaran ʁanaw najawannati.
S.TRANSL: 漢人知道了噶瑪蘭的習俗, 所以他們就那樣.
The Han people knew the customs of Kavalan, so they did so.

S.FORM: spaw tu patayay wasu u pa'tayay taquq spawanna ta zengnana qaniaw.
S.PHON: spaw tu patajaj wasu u paʔtajaj taquq spawanna ta z~rəŋnana qaniaw.
S.FORM: spaw tu patayay wasu u pa'tayay taquq spawanna ta zengnana qaniaw.
S.PHON: spaw tu patajaj wasu u paʔtajaj taquq spawanna ta z~rəŋnana qaniaw.
S.TRANSL: 他們把死狗或死雞丟到水田裡.
They left dead dogs or chickens in the farm.

S.FORM: titaanna baq na baqita na bayita nani.
S.PHON: titaanna βaq na βaqita na βajita nani.
S.FORM: titaanna baq na baqita na bayita nani.
S.PHON: titaanna βaq na βaqita na βajita nani.

TRANSL.notes: 我們的祖先們就看到了(田裡死去的狗或雞).

S.TRANSL: 我們的祖先們就看到了 .

TRANSL.notes: Our ancestors saw them (dead dogs or chickens in the farm).

S.TRANSL: Our ancestors saw them .

S.FORM: mana yau nazawai patayay sukaw nayaway zinna baqi.
S.PHON: mana jau naz~rawai patajaj sukaw najawaj z~rinna βaqi.
S.FORM: mana yau nazawai patayay sukaw nayaway zinna baqi.
S.PHON: mana jau naz~rawai patajaj sukaw najawaj z~rinna βaqi.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼會有這樣的死掉的東西,那樣的東西不好,我們的祖先這樣想.
'How come there are such dead things.' 'That kind of things are bad,' thought our ancestors.

S.FORM: izauannati tayan idadannati sukawti kowayan zau zinna baqian haw.
S.PHON: iz~rauannati tajan iɮaɮannati sukawti k*wajan z~rau z~rinna βaqian haw.
S.FORM: izauannati tayan idadannati sukawti kowayan zau zinna baqian haw.
S.PHON: iz~rauannati tajan iɮaɮannati sukawti k*wajan z~rau z~rinna βaqian haw.
S.TRANSL: 他們把地留在那裡不管,並且把它圍起來,這個田就不能耕作了,老人們這麼想.

TRANSL.notes: (They) left them there and surrounded (that place). The land cannot be plowed, thought the elders.

S.TRANSL: left them there and surrounded . The land cannot be plowed, thought the elders.

S.FORM: nani tenes maiti niquayanay titaanna na busus nani.
S.PHON: nani tənəs maiti niquajanaj titaanna na βusus nani.
S.FORM: nani tenes maiti niquayanay titaanna na busus nani.
S.PHON: nani tənəs maiti niquajanaj titaanna na βusus nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個很久沒有人耕作的田被漢人看到了.
The land which had not been plowed for a long time was seen by the Hans.

W.TRANSL: 完成-耕作-名物化=關係詞

S.FORM: mai kowayannumi zau.
S.PHON: mai k*wajannumi z~rau.
S.FORM: mai kowayannumi zau.
S.PHON: mai k*wajannumi z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 你們很久沒有耕作這塊田了.

TRANSL.notes: (You) haven't plowed this land for a long time.

S.TRANSL: haven't plowed this land for a long time.

S.FORM: aikupati zinna sadiwayannati nayau zengna na baqian taiyan nani.
S.PHON: aikupati z~rinna saɮiwajannati najau z~rəŋna na βaqian taijan nani.
S.FORM: aikupati zinna sadiwayannati nayau zengna na baqian taiyan nani.
S.PHON: aikupati z~rinna saɮiwajannati najau z~rəŋna na βaqian taijan nani.

TRANSL.notes: "輪到我佔據(噶瑪蘭)祖先那邊的田地了", 漢人這麼想.

S.TRANSL: "輪到我佔據 祖先那邊的田地了", 漢人這麼想.

TRANSL.notes: It's my turn, thought the Hans, to occupy the farms of the (Kavalan) ancestors there.

S.TRANSL: It's my turn, thought the Hans, to occupy the farms of the ancestors there.

S.FORM: Runtu tabay pamengti masiyun masiyun nani pamengti kitutti.
S.PHON: ʁuntu taβaj paməŋti masijun masijun nani paməŋti kitutti.
S.FORM: Runtu tabay pamengti masiyun masiyun nani pamengti kitutti.
S.PHON: ʁuntu taβaj paməŋti masijun masijun nani paməŋti kitutti.
S.TRANSL: 土地本來很寬大,但不知不覺地漸漸變小了.
The land was originally wide and large, but became smaller gradually.

S.FORM: titaanna baqian taiyanan 'nay baq na baqita taiyan nani.
S.PHON: titaanna βaqian taijanan ʔnaj βaq na βaqita taijan nani.
S.FORM: titaanna baqian taiyanan 'nay baq na baqita taiyan nani.
S.PHON: titaanna βaqian taijanan ʔnaj βaq na βaqita taijan nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們的祖先看了之後.
Our ancestors there saw it.

S.FORM: maitiita tu zengna taziyan.
S.PHON: maitiita tu z~rəŋna taz~rijan.
S.FORM: maitiita tu zengna taziyan.
S.PHON: maitiita tu z~rəŋna taz~rijan.
S.TRANSL: 我們這邊沒有田了.
We had no farms here.

S.FORM: samawmangpaita taziyan ka.
S.PHON: samawmaŋpaita taz~rijan ka.
S.FORM: samawmangpaita taziyan ka.
S.PHON: samawmaŋpaita taz~rijan ka.
S.TRANSL: 我們在這邊也沒用, 幹嘛留在這裡呢.
It's useless for us to stay here.

S.FORM: qangima sayza matadin zinna nani matadinti pasa tiboR.
S.PHON: qaŋima sajz~ra mataɮin z~rinna nani mataɮinti pasa tiβ*ʁ.
S.FORM: qangima sayza matadin zinna nani matadinti pasa tiboR.
S.PHON: qaŋima sajz~ra mataɮin z~rinna nani mataɮinti pasa tiβ*ʁ.

TRANSL.notes: 他們想說乾脆離開好了,(所以)他們就往南遷移.

S.TRANSL: 他們想說乾脆離開好了, 他們就往南遷移.

TRANSL.notes: They think they should leave (so) they left for the south.

S.TRANSL: They think they should leave they left for the south.

S.FORM: mzaqis tu ipaz qabawaay sumaqaiay nayawti mbuRaw pasa qalinku.
S.PHON: mz~raqis tu ipaz~r qaβawaaj sumaqaiaj najawti mβuʁaw pasa qarinku.
S.FORM: mzaqis tu ipaz qabawaay sumaqaiay nayawti mbuRaw pasa qalinku.
S.PHON: mz~raqis tu ipaz~r qaβawaaj sumaqaiaj najawti mβuʁaw pasa qarinku.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)搭竹筏,搭船,或走路遷移往花蓮.

S.TRANSL: 搭竹筏,搭船,或走路遷移往花蓮.

TRANSL.notes: (They) left for Hualien by raft, boat, or on foot.

S.TRANSL: left for Hualien by raft, boat, or on foot.

S.FORM: muna niqaqaanna maseq tu qalinku nani.
S.PHON: muna niqaqaanna masəq tu qarinku nani.
S.FORM: muna niqaqaanna maseq tu qalinku nani.
S.PHON: muna niqaqaanna masəq tu qarinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們首先到達的地方是花蓮.
The place where they arrived first is Hualien.

S.FORM: yau taizaan taqeliawanan maseq taqeliawanan.
S.PHON: jau taiz~raan taqəriawanan masəq taqəriawanan.
S.FORM: yau taizaan taqeliawanan maseq taqeliawanan.
S.PHON: jau taiz~raan taqəriawanan masəq taqəriawanan.
S.TRANSL: 有到那個茄禮村, 到達茄禮村.
In qeliawanan.

S.FORM: wa tabay taziyan nengi qaizuwanan ta taziyan zinna qaniawu nani.
S.PHON: wa taβaj taz~rijan nəŋi qaiz~ruwanan ta taz~rijan z~rinna qaniawu nani.
S.FORM: wa tabay taziyan nengi qaizuwanan ta taziyan zinna qaniawu nani.
S.PHON: wa taβaj taz~rijan nəŋi qaiz~ruwanan ta taz~rijan z~rinna qaniawu nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們說, '這裡很寬,是可以住的好地方.
'It is so wide here and is thus a good place for living,' said they.

S.FORM: taziyanti qaniau kumoway.
S.PHON: taz~rijanti qaniau kum*waj.
S.FORM: taziyanti qaniau kumoway.
S.PHON: taz~rijanti qaniau kum*waj.
S.TRANSL: 他們在這裡開墾了.
They plowed here.

S.FORM: neng tengnes nani yauti zipun tu mizaay tu lazat tayan kuanay tu iza nani.
S.PHON: nəŋ təŋnəs nani jauti z~ripun tu miz~raaj tu raz~rat tajan kuanaj tu iz~ra nani.
S.FORM: neng tengnes nani yauti zipun tu mizaay tu lazat tayan kuanay tu iza nani.
S.PHON: nəŋ təŋnəs nani jauti z~ripun tu miz~raaj tu raz~rat tajan kuanaj tu iz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 過了很久,有日本人來管理這些人.

TRANSL.notes: After a long time, there (came) Japanese governing these people.

S.TRANSL: After a long time, there Japanese governing these people.

S.FORM: titaanna skaw sayza ni nikuananna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna skaw sajz~ra ni nikuananna nani.
S.FORM: titaanna skaw sayza ni nikuananna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna skaw sajz~ra ni nikuananna nani.

TRANSL.notes: 看了之後,(我們祖先)可能認為管理的方式不好.

S.TRANSL: 看了之後, 可能認為管理的方式不好.

TRANSL.notes: After seeing this, (our ancestors) probably thought that how the Japanese governed the people was bad."

S.TRANSL: After seeing this, probably thought that how the Japanese governed the people was bad."

S.FORM: mizati masawati tu zipun.
S.PHON: miz~rati masawati tu z~ripun.
S.FORM: mizati masawati tu zipun.
S.PHON: miz~rati masawati tu z~ripun.
S.TRANSL: 就跟日本人打.
They fought against the Japanese.

S.FORM: suqas kebalan atu qizaya' taiyan nani.
S.PHON: suqas kəβaran atu qiz~rajaʔ taijan nani.
S.FORM: suqas kebalan atu qizaya' taiyan nani.
S.PHON: suqas kəβaran atu qiz~rajaʔ taijan nani.
S.TRANSL: 噶瑪蘭和阿美族輸了.
Kavalan and Amis there lost.

S.FORM: maitis qakapaRanna zipun nani matalinti uman.
S.PHON: maitis qakapaʁanna z~ripun nani matarinti uman.
S.FORM: maitis qakapaRanna zipun nani matalinti uman.
S.PHON: maitis qakapaʁanna z~ripun nani matarinti uman.

TRANSL.notes: 怕被日本人抓到, (他們)再換地方.

S.TRANSL: 怕被日本人抓到, 再換地方.

TRANSL.notes: (They) are afraid of being caught by the Japanese so transferred to another place again.

S.TRANSL: are afraid of being caught by the Japanese so transferred to another place again.

S.FORM: sa pasazui ta qoRo'an tataqemuanan.
S.PHON: sa pasaz~rui ta q*ʁ*ʔan tataqəmuanan.
S.FORM: sa pasazui ta qoRo'an tataqemuanan.
S.PHON: sa pasaz~rui ta q*ʁ*ʔan tataqəmuanan.
S.TRANSL: 往那個磯萁和龜庵.
To qoRo' and taqemuan.

S.FORM: yau tataqemuanan yau tasinsiaan yau ta a yau pateR tapateRungan.
S.PHON: jau tataqəmuanan jau tasinsiaan jau ta a jau patəʁ tapatəʁuŋan.
S.FORM: yau tataqemuanan yau tasinsiaan yau ta a yau pateR tapateRungan.
S.PHON: jau tataqəmuanan jau tasinsiaan jau ta a jau patəʁ tapatəʁuŋan.
S.TRANSL: 有到龜庵,有到新社.
To taqemuan and pateRung

S.FORM: yau sa kulis pasazuiti uman taqeladutan atu ta tachenggongan zinna haw.
S.PHON: jau sa kuris pasaz~ruiti uman taqəraɮutan atu ta taʦhəŋg*ŋan z~rinna haw.
S.FORM: yau sa kulis pasazuiti uman taqeladutan atu ta tachenggongan zinna haw.
S.PHON: jau sa kuris pasaz~ruiti uman taqəraɮutan atu ta taʦhəŋg*ŋan z~rinna haw.
S.TRANSL: 有到立德,往那個方向再到樟原和成功.
To kulis, qeladut and chenggong.

S.FORM: X aimi baqiniq yau tasinsiaan tumuqaz tayan.
S.PHON: * aimi βaqiniq jau tasinsiaan tumuqaz~r tajan.
S.FORM: X aimi baqiniq yau tasinsiaan tumuqaz tayan.
S.PHON: * aimi βaqiniq jau tasinsiaan tumuqaz~r tajan.
S.TRANSL: 我們的祖先在新社那邊停下來上岸.
Our ancestors went ashore there in Sinshe.

S.FORM: smuRong titaanna naung 'nay tayan.
S.PHON: smuʁ*ŋ titaanna nauŋ ʔnaj tajan.
S.FORM: smuRong titaanna naung 'nay tayan.
S.PHON: smuʁ*ŋ titaanna nauŋ ʔnaj tajan.
S.TRANSL: 上岸後, 看到那裡的山.
After landing, they saw the mountains there.

S.FORM: yau iRuR hoN yau naung mzaki tu lazing zinna Ranaw.
S.PHON: jau iʁuʁ h*n jau nauŋ mz~raki tu raz~riŋ z~rinna ʁanaw.
S.FORM: yau iRuR hoN yau naung mzaki tu lazing zinna Ranaw.
S.PHON: jau iʁuʁ h*n jau nauŋ mz~raki tu raz~riŋ z~rinna ʁanaw.
S.TRANSL: 有河,有山,又靠近海邊,他們說.

TRANSL.notes: There are rivers and mountains and (the place) is near the sea, said they

S.TRANSL: There are rivers and mountains and is near the sea, said they

S.FORM: aimi kebalan mlizaq tu sazanumay.
S.PHON: aimi kəβaran mriz~raq tu saz~ranumaj.
S.FORM: aimi kebalan mlizaq tu sazanumay.
S.PHON: aimi kəβaran mriz~raq tu saz~ranumaj.

TRANSL.notes: 我們噶瑪蘭人喜歡有水的(地方).

S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭人喜歡有水的 .
We Kavalan people like the place with water.

S.FORM: yau zanum yau zanum smuRuz e zinna.
S.PHON: jau z~ranum jau z~ranum smuʁuz~r ə z~rinna.
S.FORM: yau zanum yau zanum smuRuz e zinna.
S.PHON: jau z~ranum jau z~ranum smuʁuz~r ə z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 他們說,有水我們可以生存.
With water, we can survive, said they.

S.FORM: Ranaw yauti tasinsiaan.
S.PHON: ʁanaw jauti tasinsiaan.
S.FORM: Ranaw yauti tasinsiaan.
S.PHON: ʁanaw jauti tasinsiaan.
S.TRANSL: 所以就在新社.

TRANSL.notes: Thus, (they stayed) in Xinshe.

S.TRANSL: Thus, in Xinshe.

S.FORM: mzaki tu lazing mzaki tu naung mzaki tu iRuR nayaw nani.
S.PHON: mz~raki tu raz~riŋ mz~raki tu nauŋ mz~raki tu iʁuʁ najaw nani.
S.FORM: mzaki tu lazing mzaki tu naung mzaki tu iRuR nayaw nani.
S.PHON: mz~raki tu raz~riŋ mz~raki tu nauŋ mz~raki tu iʁuʁ najaw nani.
S.TRANSL: 靠近海邊,靠近山,靠近河,那樣" .

TRANSL.notes: Near the sea, near the mountain, (and) near a river.

S.TRANSL: Near the sea, near the mountain, near a river.

S.FORM: tayanti niz sinsiaay 'nay tangi.
S.PHON: tajanti niz~r sinsiaaj ʔnaj taŋi.
S.FORM: tayanti niz sinsiaay 'nay tangi.
S.PHON: tajanti niz~r sinsiaaj ʔnaj taŋi.
S.TRANSL: 現在新社的所有的人在那邊.
All the Xinshe people now were there.

S.FORM: tuzus tu tangi aw tengnesti qaya tasaw.
S.PHON: tuz~rus tu taŋi aw təŋnəsti qaja tasaw.
S.FORM: tuzus tu tangi aw tengnesti qaya tasaw.
S.PHON: tuz~rus tu taŋi aw təŋnəsti qaja tasaw.
S.TRANSL: 一直到現在,時間也很久了.
Till now it has been a long time.

S.FORM: Rasiw u utaniti smani Rasiwbuanna nani.
S.PHON: ʁasiw u utaniti smani ʁasiwβuanna nani.
S.FORM: Rasiw u utaniti smani Rasiwbuanna nani.
S.PHON: ʁasiw u utaniti smani ʁasiwβuanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們不知道已經多少百年了.

TRANSL.notes: We do not know how many hundred years (have passed).

S.TRANSL: We do not know how many hundred years .

S.FORM: nengi wawai taziyan tasinsiaan qenabinus na XXXX kebalan taziyan.
S.PHON: nəŋi wawai taz~rijan tasinsiaan qənaβinus na **** kəβaran taz~rijan.
S.FORM: nengi wawai taziyan tasinsiaan qenabinus na XXXX kebalan taziyan.
S.PHON: nəŋi wawai taz~rijan tasinsiaan qənaβinus na **** kəβaran taz~rijan.
S.TRANSL: 噶瑪蘭在新社這裡的生活很好.
Life of Kavalan here in Xinshe is good.

S.FORM: tangi qamwazay lazat sinsia sayzi ta pateRungan.
S.PHON: taŋi qamwaz~raj raz~rat sinsia sajz~ri ta patəʁuŋan.
S.FORM: tangi qamwazay lazat sinsia sayzi ta pateRungan.
S.PHON: taŋi qamwaz~raj raz~rat sinsia sajz~ri ta patəʁuŋan.
S.TRANSL: 最多的人口是新社.
Xinshe has the most population.

S.FORM: zuma nani RaRayati sunis ngid tu laytanan wia uman sa taziyan tataipakan qelawqaway sunis.
S.PHON: z~ruma nani ʁaʁajati sunis ŋiɮ tu rajtanan wia uman sa taz~rijan tataipakan qərawqawaj sunis.
S.FORM: zuma nani RaRayati sunis ngid tu laytanan wia uman sa taziyan tataipakan qelawqaway sunis.
S.PHON: z~ruma nani ʁaʁajati sunis ŋiɮ tu rajtanan wia uman sa taz~rijan tataipakan qərawqawaj sunis.
S.TRANSL: 另外,小孩長大了想要賺錢,又再去到台北這裡工作.
In addition, the children had grown up and wanted to make money so they went here again to Taipei to work.

S.FORM: wantima baqian baibudan talepawan mlingi tu lepaw temita ay tu zengna o.
S.PHON: wantima βaqian βaiβuɮan tarəpawan mriŋi tu rəpaw təmita aj tu z~rəŋna *.
S.FORM: wantima baqian baibudan talepawan mlingi tu lepaw temita ay tu zengna o.
S.PHON: wantima βaqian βaiβuɮan tarəpawan mriŋi tu rəpaw təmita aj tu z~rəŋna *.
S.TRANSL: 只剩下老人家留守家裡與看守田地.
Only the elder stay there, watching houses and farms.

S.FORM: pilaytiimu baqian baibudan zinku.
S.PHON: pirajtiimu βaqian βaiβuɮan z~rinku.
S.FORM: pilaytiimu baqian baibudan zinku.
S.PHON: pirajtiimu βaqian βaiβuɮan z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 我說,老人家你們辛苦了.
Elders, thanks for your hard work, said I.

S.FORM: qawmang palamlamespaimi taziyan 'nay tataipakan qelawqawayay zinku.
S.PHON: qawmaŋ paramraməspaimi taz~rijan ʔnaj tataipakan qərawqawajaj z~rinku.
S.FORM: qawmang palamlamespaimi taziyan 'nay tataipakan qelawqawayay zinku.
S.PHON: qawmaŋ paramraməspaimi taz~rijan ʔnaj tataipakan qərawqawajaj z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 我們在台北這裡會認真工作.
We will work hard here in Taipei.

W.TRANSL: 努力-重疊-努力=未來=1EPL.主格

S.FORM: nayau ma sikawmaanku wanai.
S.PHON: najau ma sikawmaanku wanai.
S.FORM: nayau ma sikawmaanku wanai.
S.PHON: najau ma sikawmaanku wanai.
S.TRANSL: 我說的就這樣.謝謝.
That's what I said. Thanks.
